title: ranunculus batrachioides var. pusillus
intro: Ranunculus batrachioides var. pusillus, also known as small-flowered bog buttercup, is a variety of the Ranunculus batrachioides plant, which is native to Western North America. The plant is known to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its roots and leaves are used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Ranunculus batrachioides var. pusillus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture or infused in water to make a tea, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of indigestion, bloating, and other gastrointestinal issues.
